creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #10)

I've also tried based on snapshot:

FreeBSD-15.0-CURRENT-arm64-aarch64-ROCK64-20231012-bb679b0c4909-265904.img

which is a debug build. The result was:

# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/net/if_lagg_test:status_stress
sys/net/if_lagg_test:status_stress  ->  passed  [60.069s]

Results file id is usr_tests.20231012-055207-690962
Results saved to /root/.kyua/store/results.usr_tests.20231012-055207-690962.db

1/1 passed (0 failed)

Looks to have been fixed.
